checks.title: Every governed document has one structured map entry and lifecycle disposition.
All repository Markdown links and local anchors resolve.
Authority, current-state, historical, and conflict rules are explicit.
Resource reclamation has triggers, review frequency, and actions.
Task packs and active-development coordination avoid unnecessary context and interruption.
Stable IDs, page types, source kinds, and durable schema versions have one executable vocabulary.
Job classes, states, records, operations, and recovery contracts are single-owned and compatible.
Source records, asset roots, backup, restore, and vault identity have unambiguous authority and migration rules.
Submitted-turn authority, high-risk effects, Provider sends, and secret handling fail safe.
Decision history identifies current versus superseded contracts and passes semantic contract validation.
Requirement definitions are unique, area-allowed, and referenced outside their definition table.
Every active v0.1 requirement maps to owner, milestone, phase, status, verification, and evidence.
Every phase build item has an exit criterion or explicit deferral.
The Playbook is the sole phase owner and Milestones provides the canonical crosswalk.
P0 release scope is complete and current evidence never relies only on historical documents.
Current implementation status and remaining work are honest and centrally discoverable.
Implementation starts from requirement, owner, durable data, risks, tests, and documentation impact.
Concurrent planning and implementation changes carry explicit cost and compatibility notifications.
Ordinary changes use affected tests and change-tier checks; full governance runs at architecture, security, data, release, merge-candidate, and main nodes.
Architecture-reset manifests and scheduled full evidence are reproducible without per-slice hash ceremony.
The always-read context stays within an explicit attention budget.
Normative templates, types, and contract prose have one owner rather than synchronized copies.
Traceability is normalized and reviewable without redundant human or machine projections.
The governed inventory stays bounded and its full lifecycle map is outside default context.
Physical volume falls materially from the audited baseline without weakening verification.
